title: Quantification of a Neurological Protein in a Single Cell Without Amplification.
author: Lee D Woo Y Lim JS Park I Park SK Park JW
content: S-EPMC9201896 PMC9201896 Quantification of a Neurological Protein in a Single Cell Without Amplification. Proteins are key biomolecules that not only play various roles in the living body but also are used as biomarkers. If these proteins can be quantified at the level of a single cell
